name: First Shift — Trial, Error, and Too Much Sugar
description: Your first day! Kit guides you through making simple drinks and snacks.

customerOrders.dialogue: Just a simple coffee, please. Strong.
Something sweet and warm? Like a hug in a cup!
I need energy… but gentle energy. Do you have matcha?
Do you have anything to eat? I’m so hungry…
Ah, a classic. Black coffee, nothing fancy.
Something light? I’m running on fumes.
A latte would be lovely. With honey if you have it!

name: Afternoon Rush — 3:07 PM
description: School’s out! The student crowd floods in. Keep up!

customerOrders.dialogue: Strawberry milk!! Pretty please!
Something cold. Surprise me.
We need fuel. Coffee. Now.
Ooh… is that strawberry cake? I’ll take it!
Um… c-can I have something warm…?
Iced tea! Quick! I have practice!
A small snack would be nice. Something with honey?

name: A Quiet Evening — A Scared and Hungry Boy
description: The cafe is quiet. A small boy in a dirty school uniform slips inside…

customerOrders.dialogue: The usual, please.
Matcha latte… it’s been a long day.
Can we share a chocolate banana?
…t-thank you…
I heard you have matcha cake? I’d love a slice.
…this is… really good…
